% Cover Letter Template
% Generated by Researcher plugin: cover-letter skill
% Compile with: tectonic cover-letter.tex

\documentclass[11pt,a4paper]{letter}

\usepackage[utf8]{inputenc}
\usepackage[T1]{fontenc}
\usepackage{lmodern}
\usepackage[margin=1in]{geometry}
\usepackage{hyperref}
\hypersetup{colorlinks=true, urlcolor=blue}

\signature{
    CORRESPONDING AUTHOR NAME\\
    \small Department, University\\
    \small City, Country\\
    \small \href{mailto:email@example.com}{email@example.com}
}

\address{
    CORRESPONDING AUTHOR NAME\\
    Department, University\\
    Address Line\\
    City, Country
}

\date{\today}

\begin{document}

\begin{letter}{
    EDITOR NAME\\
    Editor-in-Chief\\
    JOURNAL NAME\\
}

\opening{Dear EDITOR NAME,}

% --- Submission statement ---
We are pleased to submit our manuscript entitled ``TITLE'' for consideration for publication in \textit{JOURNAL NAME}.

% --- Contribution summary (2-3 sentences) ---
In this work, we [brief description of what the paper does and the main finding]. Our results demonstrate [key result or contribution]. This advances the field by [significance statement].

% --- Journal fit ---
We believe this manuscript is well-suited for \textit{JOURNAL NAME} because [explain relevance to journal scope and readership].

% --- Originality and exclusivity ---
This manuscript has not been published elsewhere and is not under consideration by any other journal. All authors have read and approved the final manuscript.

% --- Author contributions (if required) ---
% Author contributions: A.B. conceived the study; C.D. performed experiments; E.F. analyzed data; all authors contributed to writing.

% --- Suggested reviewers (optional) ---
We suggest the following potential reviewers:
\begin{enumerate}
    \item Name, Affiliation (\href{mailto:reviewer@example.com}{reviewer@example.com}), expertise in TOPIC
    \item Name, Affiliation (\href{mailto:reviewer@example.com}{reviewer@example.com}), expertise in TOPIC
    \item Name, Affiliation (\href{mailto:reviewer@example.com}{reviewer@example.com}), expertise in TOPIC
\end{enumerate}

% --- Excluded reviewers (optional) ---
% We request that the following individuals not serve as reviewers due to [conflict of interest]: ...

% --- Conflict of interest ---
The authors declare no conflicts of interest.

% --- Data availability ---
All data and code supporting this study are available at [repository URL / upon request].

% --- Funding ---
% This work was supported by [funding source, grant number].

\closing{Sincerely,}

\end{letter}
\end{document}
